title: Gender Minorities at Work 2003: Open-ended Responses
description: The dataset contains the responses to the open-ended questions in Gender Minorities at Work 2003 study (FSD2797). This separate dataset has been created because including the full responses in the quantitative dataset has not been possible. The study explored the work-related circumstances and experiences of gender minorities in Finland. The study was part of the EQUAL Initiative - funded by the European Social Fund and Ministry of Employment, Finland - whose aim was to chart and improve the lab
license: In accordance with the agreement between FSD and the depositor.
